Document:
# EMERGENCY POWERS Colonial Administration may issue temporary emergency orders during colony-wide danger, including: curfews, travel restrictions, evacuation orders, quarantine orders, area lockdowns, rationing, communications restrictions, forced decontamination, and temporary seizure of vehicles or equipment.
Emergency orders must be tied to a genuine safety concern.
[bold]Violating an emergency order:[/bold] - 10 min (minor violation) | 20 min if it endangers others | Permanent confinement if it causes mass harm, outbreak, or colony collapse risk
